summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CropSense AI's three new features: History management, Multi-language support, and WhatsApp sharing. Backend is 100% functional with all APIs working perfectly. Frontend UI components are fully functional. One integration issue identified during analysis flow.

working_endpoints.status: All CRUD operations working perfectly - POST, GET, DELETE (specific), DELETE (all)
Multi-language support working - English, Hindi (हिन्दी), Marathi (मराठी) all generating proper responses
Working correctly with proper test images
Both GET and POST working correctly

integration_issues.issue: Frontend shows 'net::ERR_FILE_NOT_FOUND' when calling /api/classify during analysis. Backend API works fine when tested directly.
integration_issues.details: Console error: 'REQUEST FAILED: https://harvest-health-12.preview.emergentagent.com/api/classify - net::ERR_FILE_NOT_FOUND'. This prevents end-to-end analysis flow testing.

passed_tests: All History CRUD operations (save, get, delete specific, clear all)
Language selector UI with all three languages functional
History page navigation and empty state display
WhatsApp share button present and interactive
All page navigation (landing → app → history → app)
Backend classification endpoint working with proper test images
Backend advisory endpoint with language parameter working

success_percentage.integration: Partial (backend APIs work, frontend-backend connection issue during analysis)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend-backend integration issue during analysis flow. The /api/classify endpoint returns 'net::ERR_FILE_NOT_FOUND' when called from frontend, but works perfectly when tested directly. This may be a CORS issue, routing problem, or frontend API URL configuration issue. All backend APIs are fully functional.
